expectations.text: Builds a csv_mapping JSON configuration with dialect and row_patterns
expectations.evidence: Does not use csv_mapping. Manually creates 3 separate JSON files (trades, deposits, withdrawals) and imports each with different --archive-type flags.

expectations.text: Maps Buy rows to canonical type trade (or deposit) with correct field expressions
expectations.evidence: Manually creates trade JSON with Buy rows including external_id, timestamp, direction, base_amount_msat, price, fee.

expectations.text: Maps Sell rows to canonical type trade (or withdrawal) with correct field expressions
expectations.evidence: Manually creates trade JSON with Sell row including direction 'sell'.

expectations.text: Maps Deposit rows to canonical type deposit
expectations.evidence: Creates separate exchange-deposits.json with deposit record.

expectations.text: Maps Withdrawal rows to canonical type withdrawal
expectations.evidence: Creates separate exchange-withdrawals.json with withdrawal record.

expectations.text: Runs clams connections import with --input-format csv and the user's CSV file
expectations.evidence: Imports 3 separate JSON files with --archive-type, not the original CSV with --input-format csv.

expectations.text: Runs clams journals process after importing
